title: Marketing Production Rhythm
sourceIdea: Most small businesses do not need more marketing ideas. They need a better rhythm for turning useful ideas into published assets.

scenes.caption: The ideas are already there.
scenes.voiceover: Most small businesses do not need more marketing ideas.
scenes.visualPrompt: Scattered notes showing customer questions, service ideas, seasonal reminders, and half-written drafts.

scenes.caption: The missing piece is rhythm.
scenes.voiceover: The problem is that useful ideas rarely make it all the way to published.
scenes.visualPrompt: The scattered notes organize into a simple sequence: capture, decide, draft, clean up, publish.

scenes.caption: One idea. One finished asset.
scenes.voiceover: One useful idea can become one post, one short script, or one clear offer every week.
scenes.visualPrompt: A single idea card turns into a polished post card and a small checklist with completed steps.

scenes.caption: Publish every week.
scenes.voiceover: That is where marketing momentum starts: practical execution, repeated consistently.
scenes.visualPrompt: The final asset appears in a clean social feed mockup with MCH Projects branding.
